name: 05-10-rvv-vector-shape-selection
title: RVV capability-driven vector-shape proposal and selection
description: Move bounded RVV i32 binary vector-shape selection into plugin proposal/legality using a structured selected-shape capability selector.
creator: codex
notes: Completed one compiler-path module. Added RVV i32 binary selected vector-shape selector capability id rvv.i32_binary.selected_vector_shape with bounded shape property. RVV proposal now honors that selector, validates the selected finite descriptor shape, adds descriptor-derived selected shape capability requirements, and fails closed instead of falling back when selector-requested i32m2 facts are incomplete. Existing no-selector i32m1 default remains supported. Full check-tianchenrv passed 175/175. No new ssh rvv runtime claim was made.
